_comment: Forward-compatible stub for Sprint 9's homepage Canon entry-of-the-week block. Replicates the hardcoded Caleb Williams entry that Sprint 9 shipped, and is the fallback when canon_entries is empty. When canon entries exist in the database, cfb_rankings.canon.data.load_featured_entry rotates weekly through every list's top-5 instead of reading this file. See src/cfb_rankings/canon/data.py:load_featured_entry.
list_title: The 100 Best Players of the CFP Era
summary_short: Bridged the Oklahoma–USC Lincoln Riley transition and won the Heisman doing it in his first year as a starter at his second program.
statline: 2022 Heisman · 10,082 career passing yards · 93 TD · 14 INT
